turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hi , andrew . how is andrew ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hey , good to see the doctor .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is doing well , the doctor is doing well .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , the doctor knows the nurse told andrew about dax . the doctor would like to tell dax a little bit about andrew .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: uh , so , andrew is a 59-year-old male with a past medical history , significant for depression , type two diabetes , and hypertension who presents today with an upper respiratory infection . so , andrew , what's going on ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah . andrew and andrew's wife were doing a bit of work out in the yard in the last week or so and andrew started to feel really tired , was short of breath . um , andrew and andrew's wife- andrew and andrew's wife were not wearing masks as much at the end of the summer and andrew thinks andrew caught andrew's first cold and andrew thinks the cold just got worse .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . um , now , has andrew had andrew's covid vaccines ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , both covid vaccines .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and , um , does andrew have any history of any seasonal allergies at all ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: none whatsoever .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and when the doctor says andrew is having some shortness of breath , did andrew feel short of breath walking around or at rest ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , usually , the shortness of breath was lifting or carrying something . andrew and andrew's wife were doing some landscaping , so andrew was carrying some heavy bags of soil and andrew , andrew got really winded . the shortness of breath really surprised andrew .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and is andrew coughing up anything ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: not yet , but andrew feels like coughing up something is next .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and fevers ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , andrew felt a little warm , but andrew , andrew just thought the warm feeling was because andrew was exerting andrew .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and any other symptoms like muscle aches , joint pain , fatigue ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: andrew's elbows hurt quite a bit and andrew's knees were pretty tired . l- like andrew said , andrew really felt some tension around andrew's knees , but , uh , andrew thinks the knee tension was a lot to do with , uh , lifting the bags .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . um , so , the doctor knows , you know , how about , how is andrew doing in terms of andrew's other medical problems , like andrew's depression ? how is andrew doing with the depression ? the doctor knows the doctor and andrew have , you know , talked about not putting andrew on medication for depression because andrew is on medication for other things . what's going on ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: andrew- it's been kind of a crazy year and a half . andrew was a little concerned about depression but , for the most part , andrew has been , been doing well with depression . andrew's wife got andrew into barre classes , to help andrew relax and andrew thinks the barre classes are working .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right , great . and , and in terms of andrew's diabetes , how is andrew doing watching andrew's , andrew's diet and andrew's sugar intake ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , andrew has been monitoring andrew's sugar levels while andrew is going to work during the week . uh , not so , uh , if its saturday or sunday andrew usually doesn't remember . uh , andrew's diet's been pretty good for the most part , except for , you know , some house parties and things like that . but , uh , andrew has been good for the most part .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and have andrew's sugar levels been elevated at all since this episode of andrew's-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and then , how , lastly , for andrew's high blood pressure , has andrew been monitoring andrew's blood pressures at home ? did andrew buy the cuff like the doctor suggested ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , same thing . during the while andrew'm going to work, andrew'm regular about monitoring andrew's blood pressure, but if its a saturday or sunday, not so much . but , uh , andrew's blood pressure , andrew's blood pressure has been under control .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: but is andrew taking andrew's medication ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , andrew is taking andrew's medication .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . well , you know , the doctor knows that , you know , andrew has endorsed , you know , the shortness of breath and some joint pain . um , how about any other symptoms ? nausea or vomiting ? diarrhea ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: anything like nausea or vomiting or diarrhea ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . well , the doctor wan na go ahead and do a quick physical exam , all right ? hey , dragon , show the doctor the vital signs . so , andrew's vital signs here in the office look quite good .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: you know , everything's looking normal , andrew do n't have a fever , which is really good . um , the doctor is just gon na go ahead and listen to andrew's heart and andrew's lungs and , kind of , the doctor'll let andrew know what the doctor hears , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so , on andrew's physical exam , you know , andrew's heart sounds nice and strong . andrew's lungs , andrew do have scattered ronchi bilaterally on andrew's lung exam . uh , the ronchi clears with cough . um , the doctor do notice a little bit of , um , some edema of andrew's lower extremities and andrew do have some pain to palpation of andrew's elbows bilaterally . um , so , let's go ahead , the doctor want to look at some of andrew's results , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon . show the doctor the chest x-ray . so , the doctor reviewed the results of andrew's chest x-ray and everything looks good . there's no airspace disease , there's no pneumonia , so the chest x-ray results are all very , very good , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon . show the doctor the diabetic labs . and here , looking at andrew's diabetic labs , you know , andrew's hemoglobin a1c is a little elevated at eight .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor'd like to see andrew's hemoglobin a1c a little bit better , around six or seven , if possible .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , so let's talk a little bit about the doctor's assessment and the doctor's plan for andrew .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , for andrew's first problem , this upper respiratory infection , the doctor believe andrew , andrew have a viral syndrome , okay ? the doctor'll go ahead and the doctor'll send a covid test , just to make sure that andrew do n't have covid .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: uh , but overall , the doctor think that , um , you know , the viral syndrome will resolve in a couple of days . the doctor do n't think andrew have covid , andrew do n't have any exposures , that type of thing .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , the doctor think that the viral syndrome will improve . the doctor'll give andrew some robitussin for andrew's cough and the doctor would encourage andrew take some ibuprofen , tylenol for any fever , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: andrew got it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: for andrew's next problem , andrew's depression , you know , depression sounds like andrew's doing well with depression , but again , the doctor'm happy to start andrew on a med- , a medical regiment or ...

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . refer andrew to psychotherapy , if andrew think psychotherapy would be helpful .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: would andrew like psychotherapy ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: u- u- um , maybe not necessarily . maybe in a , uh , few months andrew and the doctor will check on depression .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . for andrew's third problem , andrew's type two diabetes , the doctor want to go ahead and increase andrew's metformin to 1000 milligrams , twice daily .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and the doctor'm gon na get an- another hemoglobin a1c in four months , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay , sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon . order a hemoglobin a1c . and lastly , for andrew's high blood pressure , the high blood pressure looks like andrew's doing a really good job managing the high blood pressure . the doctor want to go ahead and continue andrew on the , um , lisinopril , 20 milligrams a day .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and the doctor'm gon na go ahead and order a lipid panel , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does andrew need a refill of the lisinopril ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: actually , andrew do .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . hey , dragon . order lisinopril , 20 milligrams daily . so , the nurse will be in , the nurse'll help andrew , uh , make a follow-up appointment with the doctor . the doctor want to see andrew again in about four months .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: let the doctor know if andrew's symptoms worsen and the doctor and andrew can talk more about andrew's symptoms , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: andrew got it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . hey , dragon . finalize the note .
